notes: The response admirably surfaces real compliance risks (FMA bias finding, CCCFA gap, Centrix DSA scope) and references a baseline/target for decision time, but it functions as a risk advisory and phased delivery roadmap rather than a discovery artefact — the problem is partially solution-framed as a compliance remediation plan, no named personas with role/timing/cost are present, the MVP is a broad phase description rather than a bounded testable scope, and there is no explicit out-of-scope section with named items and reasons.
